evidence.excerpt: id REQ-CHANGE-OBSERVATORY-001 kind requirement schema_version requirement v1 title Install-integrated SDLC Change Observatory summary Provide a local visual application shipped inside the Agentic SDLC plugin that reconstructs what was requested decided changed verified and released across stories phases contracts and iterations for technical and non-technical readers. status proposed acceptance_criteria After plugin installation agentic-sdlc observe --root <project> launches the included application without a separate build or cloud service. approvals.summary: Approved under Antonio's delegated lineage-completion scope: local repository evidence, Node tests, and loopback browser QA only; no install, external access, deployment, secret, or destructive capability.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Complete the installed Change Observatory causal lineage experience with one new local-only story: refresh current project context, approve the exact lineage dossier work brief and capability boundary, confirm task start, implement and validate; excludes installs, external services, deployment, secrets, destructive actions, production access, and unrelated work.
